Postcard.title: Postcard
Postcard.description: A digital postcard with content and metadata.

location.description: The location where the postcard was 'sent' from.

content.description: The handwritten message on the postcard.

backContent.description: The message on the back of the postcard.

image.description: The image URL for the postcard.

lastEditedBy.description: The name of the last person who edited the postcard.

lastEditedByUid.description: The UID of the last person who edited the postcard.

postcards.description: A collection of all postcards in the gallery.
